title: CD-I Pokemon Tournament Part 2 Zelda VS Duke Onkled
description:
Well since the NUMBER 1 was totally winning during the votes video I made I decided to delete the video and simply start to upload the *Small part*

And don't worry for the people who are *Kind of* lazy I will also upload a long version with all the battles when i'm done with the video.

So yeah before the pro hardcore of the pokemon games start going Ape shit while watching this video.

Remember that i'm far from be a PRO in pokemon games I do not know every single pokemon strong point and how to use them to to maximise they efficacy.

So I decided to simply make my own rules and make any pokemon as strong as I want of course I will keep in mind a Raichu might have more trouble to beat a Golem that he would have to beat a Magikarp and so on,

So what I decided to change?

Max level is 400. (OF COURSE BIGGER NUMBER = MOAR EPIC!!11!!11)

Shiny pokemons are stronger that the normal pokemon. (As they should be if you ask me!)

The pokemons can use ALL the moves they want like in the anime so the limit is not only 4 moves. (Of course I keep in mind that a Charizard cannot use Thunder or Hydro Pump and so on. =/

Few pokemons will be far stronger that they're in the game example Mew is alot stronger.

Few status effects are alot stronger like the poison which deal insane amount of damages samething with burn, sleep might last longer too if I want and they can STACK as much as I want!. ;) SLP + PSN + BRN = YOU ARE DEAD NOT A BIG SURPRISE!

Most of the pokemon have no ability, I was too lazy to add them...
(So yeah, no automatic Kyogre Rains and No automatic Groundon Sun...)

That's the major changed...

So anyway, I hope you will enjoy this video and I will start to work on the second battle now and if you have *GOOD* idea to improve the battles tell me. =P

Also credit to Bizkit047 for the Killer Instinct gameplay video. (Which was very useful.)

*SONG LIST*

From the first to the last you hear in this video!

1: Legend of Zelda Ocarina of Time - Market theme
2  Killer Instinct - Orchid Theme
3: Killer Instinct - Sabrewulf Theme
4: Pokemon HeartGold/SoulSilver - Team Rocket battle theme
5: Pokemon Black & White - Elite 4 Battle theme
6: Pokemon Black & White - Gym Leader's Last Stand!
7: Pokemon Black 2 & White 2 - Gym Leader Defeated

*END OF THE SONG LIST*
